title: Trump shooter's AR from company he toured in 2023
shortDescription: The shooter in Saturday's assassination attempt reportedly used an AR rifle manufactured by DPSM Panther Arms.

title: Man posed as Trump rally shooter as 'a joke' | Fact check
shortDescription: A social media user pretended to be Thomas Matthew Crooks in a hoax video. He said in later posts that he was not the shooter.

title: Voters are crippled by rent prices. Biden to propose a 5% cap on hikes
shortDescription: Corporate landlords would lose the ability to write off depreciation values from their units if they increase tenants' rent more than 5%.

title: Could dismissing Trump's charges get Judge Aileen Cannon removed?
